channel.title: xai_rss security feed
channel.description: Urgent security posts collected from trusted X accounts.

item.title: Cuties AI platform suffers major data breach
item.description: summary: NSFW AI companion Cuties AI breached; 144k email addresses, prompts for AI adult images, and content URLs exposed publicly last week. 26% emails previously pwned. canonical_author: @haveibeenpwned source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 100 source_reason: Have I Been Pwned run by Troy Hunt, globally trusted for accurate breach notifications and analysis. urgency_reason: Newly disclosed breach of sensitive user data from authoritative breach tracking service. vendors: Cuties AI products: Cuties AI related_sources: - https://x.com/haveibeenpwned/status/2038874122609115427
